summary: A pass-through that marks a clean output point in a texture chain. Best practice is to end every TOP chain with a Null for stable referencing.

key_params.name: cook
key_params.note: Cook behavior: Always, Off, or dependent on viewers/exports

common_gotchas: A Null TOP with no input will not error but will output black — ensure it is actually wired.
Use Nulls as stable reference points so downstream references do not break when you restructure.
